Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel Feder, Esq. of the Law Offices of Daniel Feder, T:415.391.9476, for plaintiffs/moving party;
Stephanie T. Yang, Esq. of Jackson Lewis PC, T:415.796.5486, for defendants.

RULING: There being no objection, or opposition, and for good cause shown, PLAINTIFF ROLLIE CARDEMA'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED. Proposed order submitted to the Court for review.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Feder, Esq. (415-710-3277) for Plaintiff ROLLIE CARDEMA.
Stephanie Yang, Esq. (415-394-9400) of Jackson Lewis for Defendant Special Dispatch.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROLLIE CARDEMA's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Approved. The Final approval hearing and motion for fees will be heard on on March 21, 2018 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript.)Order signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR No: 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org. (D302)
